---
title: "Jacques-Étienne Montgolfier"
---

## Jacques-Étienne Montgolfier

**Dates:** (1745-1799)

### Description

inventor of the hot air balloon

### Biography

He married Mademoiselle Brun (d.1845), who had been a nun.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 14th [1895]
- Letter from August 11. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
